creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Further results: with UEFI boot and without drm, the system gives a black screen on wakeup from suspend to RAM (probably to be expected).  Starting an X server does not work, though the system still reacts to input.

With drm, I can wake up the system just fine as long as no X server is active. The error when waking up with an X server active seems to be this (not 100% sure):

NVRM: GPU at PCI:0000:01:00: GPU-8e53033f-afae-9376-d947-ac9dffc8eb64
NVRM: Xid (PCI:0000:01:00): 13, pid='<unknown>', name=<unknown>, Graphics Exception: Shader Program Header 1 Error
NVRM: Xid (PCI:0000:01:00): 13, pid='<unknown>', name=<unknown>, Graphics Exception: Shader Program Header 2 Error
NVRM: Xid (PCI:0000:01:00): 13, pid='<unknown>', name=<unknown>, Graphics Exception: Shader Program Header 3 Error
NVRM: Xid (PCI:0000:01:00): 13, pid='<unknown>', name=<unknown>, Graphics Exception: Shader Program Header 9 Error
NVRM: Xid (PCI:0000:01:00): 13, pid='<unknown>', name=<unknown>, Graphics Exception: Shader Program Header 18 Error
NVRM: Xid (PCI:0000:01:00): 13, pid='<unknown>', name=<unknown>, Graphics Exception: ESR 0x405840=0xa004020e
NVRM: Xid (PCI:0000:01:00): 13, pid='<unknown>', name=<unknown>, Graphics Exception: ESR 0x405848=0x80000000
NVRM: Xid (PCI:0000:01:00): 13, pid=1673, name=Xorg, Graphics Exception: ChID 0008, Class 0000b197, Offset 00002390, Data 46269400
